mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room_game_state (room_id, state_json, state_version) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{stateJson}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT room_id, state_json, state_version FROM room_game_state WHERE room_id = #{roomId} LIMIT 1
SELECT state_version FROM room_game_state WHERE room_id = #{roomId} LIMIT 1
